module.name: arrow
module.description: Arrow connecting elements. 8 directions and several shapes (triangle, chevron, line, double).
module.aiSpec: Insert a directional arrow glyph to point between or connect items (e.g. show flow or a "leads to" relationship). Inline module with no body — everything is controlled by parameters: `direction` (8 compass directions) and `shape` (triangle/chevron/line/double). Often placed on its own between two blocks. Example: `<!-- @arrow direction: down, shape: triangle -->`.
